release.publicApiMeaning: PUBLIC_API.md files guard against accidental exports; they are not API or schema freezes.

invariants: Every fact has exactly one writer.
Do not derive intent from actual.

holds.text: MCP registry support is not part of the 0.2.x surface; it remains a hold until discovery, install, authority, and material contracts converge across products.

packages.name: @agent-os/kernel
packages.role: pure claim, boundary, material, tool, context, and type algebra
packages.readmeStatus: 0.2.x active development. Public exports are listed for package ownership; they are not frozen.
packages.apiStatus: 0.2.x active development. Public exports are listed for accidental export control only; this is not an API freeze.

packages.name: @agent-os/runtime
packages.role: runtime ports, admission projections, and runtime-facing API types
packages.readmeStatus: 0.2.x active development. Public exports are listed for package ownership; they are not frozen.
packages.apiStatus: 0.2.x active development. Public exports are listed for accidental export control only; this is not an API freeze.

packages.name: @agent-os/backend-cloudflare-do
packages.role: Cloudflare Durable Object backend for agentOS runtime
packages.boundary: Cloudflare DO storage, alarm, SSE, dispatch, and binding materialization
packages.readmeStatus: Backend package. It is the only substrate package that imports `cloudflare:workers`.
packages.apiStatus: Backend package. Public exports are limited to the Durable Object factory and backend-specific configuration types.

packages.name: @agent-os/backend-in-memory
packages.role: in-memory backend instance for runtime contract tests
packages.readmeStatus: Backend package for tests and local contract verification.
packages.apiStatus: Backend package for runtime contract tests. Public exports are limited to the in-memory backend constructor.

packages.readmeStatus: Backend package. It uses structural SDK types instead of importing a Cloudflare SDK.

packages.name: @agent-os/deploy
packages.readmeStatus: Carrier package. Provider-specific deploy backends are separate materializers.

packages.name: @agent-os/git-carrier
packages.readmeStatus: Carrier package. It is not a provider SDK and does not own provider-specific Git execution.

packages.name: @agent-os/staging-artifact
packages.readmeStatus: Carrier package. It owns symbolic artifact proof vocabulary, not artifact storage.

packages.name: @agent-os/verification
packages.readmeStatus: Carrier package. Verification policy and quorum rules remain app-owned.
